name: monorepo
description: A pnpm TypeScript monorepo with Express backend and Next.js frontend

scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,payment,frontend -c blue,green,yellow "pnpm --filter backend run start" "pnpm --filter backend run start:payment" "pnpm --filter frontend run start"
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @super-x402/sdk run test && pnpm --filter backend run test
